rule.description: FortiGate: FortiOS 8.0.0 log event with logid $(logid)
FortiGate: Traffic allowed from $(srcip):$(srcport) to $(dstip):$(dstport) [$(service)] policy=$(policyid)
FortiGate: Suppressed noisy allowed infrastructure traffic by service - $(service)
FortiGate: Suppressed noisy allowed ICMP traffic
FortiGate: Suppressed noisy allowed DNS, SNMP, or syslog traffic by destination port
FortiGate: Suppressed noisy allowed DNS, SNMP, or syslog traffic by source port
FortiGate: Traffic denied or invalid from $(srcip):$(srcport) to $(dstip):$(dstport) [$(service)] policy=$(policyid)
FortiGate: Failed connection attempts from $(srcip) to $(dstip) [$(service)]
FortiGate: Forward traffic statistics
FortiGate: Local traffic log
FortiGate: ZTNA traffic from $(srcip) to $(dstip)
FortiGate: Antivirus scanning engine error
FortiGate: Malware blocked - $(virus) in $(filename) from $(srcip)
FortiGate: Malware detected and allowed or monitored - $(virus) from $(srcip)
FortiGate: FortiSandbox reports file as infected from $(srcip)
FortiGate: Outbreak Prevention reported infected content from $(srcip)
FortiGate: File matches EMS threat feed from $(srcip)
FortiGate: Content disarm and reconstruction event from $(srcip) - $(filename)
FortiGate: 0-day malware stream detected from $(srcip)
FortiGate: Oversized file blocked from $(srcip)
FortiGate: IPS signature alert - $(attack) from $(srcip) to $(dstip)
FortiGate: Botnet C&C communication blocked from $(srcip) to $(dstip)
FortiGate: Botnet C&C communication detected from $(srcip) to $(dstip)
FortiGate: Malicious URL access from $(srcip) to $(dstip)
FortiGate: Ethernet/L2 protocol attack from $(srcip)
FortiGate: DoS/anomaly attack detected from $(srcip) to $(dstip) - $(attack)
FortiGate: URL blocked by URL filter - $(url) from $(srcip)
FortiGate: URL blocked by FortiGuard category [$(catdesc)] from $(srcip) - $(url)
FortiGate: URL blocked by FortiGuard risk-level from $(srcip) - $(url)
FortiGate: Web filter category warning [$(catdesc)] for $(srcip)
FortiGate: Antiphishing blocked request from $(srcip) to $(url)
FortiGate: Domain fronting detected from $(srcip)
FortiGate: Webfilter command blocked for $(srcip)
FortiGate: FortiGuard web filter rating error
FortiGate: Web filter daily quota expired for $(srcip)
FortiGate: Video filter content blocked for $(srcip)
FortiGate: FortiGuard web filter service unreachable - URL filtering impaired
FortiGate: Application blocked or reset - $(app) [$(appcat)] from $(srcip)
FortiGate: Application port enforcement violation - $(app) from $(srcip)
FortiGate: Application protocol enforcement violation - $(app) from $(srcip)
FortiGate: DLP violation - data loss blocked from $(srcip)
FortiGate: DLP violation - data loss detected from $(srcip)
FortiGate: DLP fingerprint source error
FortiGate: WAF blocked request from $(srcip) to $(hostname) [$(msg)]
FortiGate: Spam or banned-word detected from $(srcip)
FortiGate: CASB cloud access blocked for $(srcip)
FortiGate: Admin login successful - user=$(user) src=$(srcip) ui=$(ui)
FortiGate: Admin login failed - user=$(user) src=$(srcip) ui=$(ui)
FortiGate: Admin account locked or login disabled - user=$(user) src=$(srcip)
FortiGate: Admin logout - user=$(user) from $(srcip)
FortiGate: Admin disconnected - user=$(user) from $(srcip)
FortiGate: Admin password expired - user=$(user)
FortiGate: Admin VDOM access change - user=$(user)
FortiGate: FortiToken or MFA authentication failure for user=$(user)
FortiGate: Configuration changed by $(user)
FortiGate: Configuration changed via GUI by $(user)
FortiGate: Configuration change detail logged
FortiGate: Global setting changed by $(user)
FortiGate: System configuration backed up by $(user)
FortiGate: Configuration restored by $(user)
FortiGate: System started or booted
FortiGate: System shutdown
FortiGate: Device rebooted
FortiGate: Scheduled daily reboot initiated
FortiGate: Factory settings reset performed
FortiGate: Firmware image updated
FortiGate: Firmware image failed to load
FortiGate: Invalid or tampered firmware image detected
FortiGate: Application process crashed
FortiGate: FNBAM authentication error or external auth server issue
FortiGate: PPP authentication successful - user=$(user)
FortiGate: PPP authentication failed - user=$(user)
FortiGate: FortiToken or MFA lifecycle event for user=$(user)
FortiGate: Management CMDB request denied or sensitive table requested without a valid admin session
FortiGate: SNMP authentication query failed
FortiGate: Admin GUI or log access action by $(user)
FortiGate: User authentication successful - user=$(user) src=$(srcip)
FortiGate: User authentication failed - user=$(user) src=$(srcip)
FortiGate: User authentication lockout, timeout, or user limit reached - user=$(user) src=$(srcip)
FortiGate: FSSO authentication status changed - user=$(user)
FortiGate: Authentication backup, restore, or server reachability event
FortiGate: IPsec VPN tunnel established
FortiGate: IPsec VPN tunnel disconnected
FortiGate: IPsec VPN tunnel statistics
FortiGate: IPsec VPN negotiation or SA status changed - tunnel=$(vpntunnel) remip=$(remip)
FortiGate: IPsec VPN negotiation or connection error - tunnel=$(vpntunnel) remip=$(remip)
FortiGate: Critical IPsec ESP event - tunnel=$(vpntunnel) remip=$(remip)
FortiGate: IPsec tunnel statistics or peer proposal details
FortiGate: SSL VPN tunnel up - user=$(user) remip=$(remip)
FortiGate: SSL VPN tunnel down - user=$(user) remip=$(remip)
FortiGate: SSL VPN login failed - user=$(user) remip=$(remip)
FortiGate: SSL VPN web application access denied - user=$(user) remip=$(remip)
FortiGate: SSL VPN session activity accepted - user=$(user) remip=$(remip)
FortiGate: SSL VPN session statistics, timeout, close, or unknown tag
FortiGate: SSL VPN session or tunnel error - user=$(user) remip=$(remip)
FortiGate: SSL VPN system busy or conserve mode changed
FortiGate: VPN certificate or SSL VPN setting changed
FortiGate: VPN certificate error
FortiGate: PPTP VPN tunnel, daemon, or client status changed
FortiGate: L2TP VPN tunnel, daemon, or client status changed
FortiGate: PPTP or L2TP VPN warning or failure
FortiGate: FortiClient VPN endpoint connected or disconnected - user=$(user) src=$(srcip)
FortiGate: Memory conserve mode entered - system under high load
FortiGate: Memory conserve mode exited
FortiGate: Extreme low memory mode - critical system condition
FortiGate: IPS session scan paused - fail-open mode active
FortiGate: IPS session scan resumed - normal inspection restored
FortiGate: Interface link status changed
FortiGate: Interface status changed by admin action
FortiGate: Kernel error detected
FortiGate: Socket pool exhausted - possible DoS condition
FortiGate: IP pool NAT addresses exhausted
FortiGate: Power supply failure detected
FortiGate: Power supply redundancy lost
FortiGate: Hardware temperature too high
FortiGate: Fan anomaly detected
FortiGate: Disk unavailable
FortiGate: Log disk failure imminent
FortiGate: SSD spare blocks critically low
FortiGate: Log disk full - logging may be impaired
FortiGate: Log file on disk is corrupted
FortiGate: BGP neighbor status changed
FortiGate: OSPF neighbor status changed
FortiGate: Routing table information changed
FortiGate: Critical routing event
FortiGate: SD-WAN link quality status changed
FortiGate: SD-WAN quality degraded - SLA breach possible
FortiGate: SD-WAN fail-detect triggered
FortiGate: SD-WAN neighbor status changed
FortiGate: Antivirus license expiring soon
FortiGate: IPS license expiring soon
FortiGate: Web filter license expiring soon
FortiGate: Antivirus license expired - AV protection inactive
FortiGate: Web filter license expired - URL filtering inactive
FortiGate: VM license expired
FortiGate: License status changed
FortiGate: Duplicate license detected
FortiGate: SSL/TLS certificate expiring soon
FortiGate: CRL certificate file expired
FortiGate: FortiAnalyzer connection established
FortiGate: FortiAnalyzer connection lost - centralized logging disrupted
FortiGate: FortiAnalyzer connection failed - centralized logging unavailable
FortiGate: Security violation - write permission violation detected
FortiGate: Security violation - hard link creation violation detected
FortiGate: Security violation - kernel or firmware load violation detected
FortiGate: Integrity failure - executable hash missing
FortiGate: Integrity failure - executable hash mismatch
FortiGate: DHCP lease pool full - new clients cannot receive addresses
FortiGate: DHCP lease pool usage high
FortiGate: Security Fabric loop configuration detected
FortiGate: Security Fabric upstream serial number changed - possible substitution
FortiGate: Locally-generated traffic to IoC threat-intel address detected
FortiGate: Log upload error - log forwarding disrupted
FortiGate: Admin brute-force attack detected - multiple failures from $(srcip)
FortiGate: Admin brute-force high frequency from $(srcip) - account lockout expected
FortiGate: Multiple firewall denies from $(srcip) - possible port scan or attack
FortiGate: Multiple IPS alerts from $(srcip) - sustained attack in progress
FortiGate: Multiple malware detections from $(srcip) - host likely compromised
FortiGate: Failed connection flood from $(srcip) - possible scan or DoS attack
FortiGate: Multiple DLP violations from $(srcip) - possible data exfiltration campaign
FortiGate: Multiple WAF blocks from $(srcip) - web application attack in progress
FortiGate: SSL VPN brute-force detected - multiple login failures from $(remip)
FortiGate: SSL VPN brute-force high frequency from $(remip)
FortiGate: User authentication failure burst from $(srcip)
FortiGate: Multiple user authentication failures for user=$(user)
FortiGate: IPsec VPN tunnel flapping or repeated disconnects for remip=$(remip)
FortiGate: SSL VPN repeated tunnel disconnects for user=$(user)
FortiGate: IPsec VPN negotiation error burst for remip=$(remip)
FortiGate: Multiple MFA or FortiToken failures for user=$(user)
FortiGate: Repeated unauthenticated management CMDB requests on $(devid)
FortiGate: Repeated FNBAM authentication errors on $(devid)
FortiGate: Multiple PPP authentication failures for user=$(user)
FortiGate: Repeated authentication lockout or timeout events for user=$(user)
